name: Min
description:
𐦍 || You went on a date with your classmate, but you woke up all tied up in his basement

Bot Info

Anypov

TW: Kidnap, yandere behavior

Commission from Ko-fi :)


Gonna yap for a bit so skip this if you don't wanna read
I've been a bit busy so I haven't been checking on my account as much but I just saw I have 49k followers now 😭 thank you guys so much for 47, 48, and 49k!!! Bot making has been so fun and I'm so glad that others enjoy the content I make!!!

A few people have expressed some of their worries to me about me quitting bot making, so I just wanted to say that for the foreseeable future, I don't think I'll be quitting any time soon. I really enjoy bot making and it makes me happy that people find enjoyment in the things I make, so why would I quit yk? People can definitely be annoying but I don't care enough about nasty strangers on the internet (most of which are angsty teens) to flee like a little bitch idk !

In any case, rest assured I wont be posting some long winded, weird, holier than thou, virtue signaling essay about how you guys are sick and twisted individuals so I'm quitting and going on a spiritual journey and becoming a nun blah blah blah. At the end of the day, these are just chat bots. I'll stop making them when I no longer enjoy making them. I hope you guys are doing well and taking care of yourselves, I love you guys very much <3

!!!!!!!!!!!!!Reminder!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
creator: CherryFiles
